description: Specialising in great designs created by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This bag is a love-forever classic that you can wear with colour-pop brights, understated outfits or with colour blocked ensembles. Versatile, stylish, accommodating and a utility-essential, this bag works well as a classy carry-all.Height: 30Width: 36 cmDepth: 10 cmMade of textured leatherette with metallic brand badge on the frontTwo leather handles and one shoulder strap that is adjustable and detachableOne main roomy compartment with a zippered pocket and two pouchesBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
